question_title: What will be the value of "Overnight Unsecured AMERIBOR Benchmark Interest Rate" on 2026-02-12?
summary: AMERIBOR Overnight Unsecured Rate forecast for Feb 12, 2026. Current rate is 3.66148% (Feb 5). The rate is tightly anchored to the Fed Funds effective rate (3.64%) with a small credit spread. No FOMC meeting occurs between now and Feb 12 (next meeting is March 2026), so no policy-driven shift is expected. Monte Carlo simulation using SOFR-derived daily volatility (std=0.0165%) over 5 trading days, blending mean-reverting, random walk, and fat-tailed models, produces a tight distribution centered near 3.658%.

factors.description: Current AMERIBOR rate at 3.66148% as of Feb 5, providing a strong anchor for the 1-week forecast
No FOMC meeting between Feb 5-12; next meeting in March 2026 - rate locked to current policy regime
SOFR daily volatility in stable period (Jan 5-Feb 5) only 1.65bp std - very low daily variance
AMERIBOR mean-reverts toward Fed Funds + small credit spread (~3.655%), slight downward pull from current 3.661
Tail risk from unexpected credit/liquidity events could widen AMERIBOR-SOFR spread, but Feb 12 is mid-month (no month-end effects)

reasoning: Good, I have the FRED data. The most recent AMERIBOR observations are from the last few days.
